Order Custom Sizes Online PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Selection: Choose Your Construction Fence Banner Dimensions Material Options: Select Mesh Banner Material Finishing: Choose Mounting & Installation Options Design Upload: Submit Your Construction Banner Artwork Production Time: Select Your Delivery Timeline PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Construction Fence Banner Material for Outdoor Installation

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a construction fence banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made construction fence banner!

If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom construction fence banners and signage options, including:

  • Sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'
  • Unlimited design options in our online designer
  • Multiple production times to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it
  • Mesh material designed for outdoor construction site conditions

Your construction fence banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Construction Mesh Banner Material: Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor construction sites and windy conditions.

Please note: Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your construction fence banner needs to be precise, please discuss your specific application with our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Mesh Banner Material for Construction Fence Installation

Your construction fence banner is manufactured with premium materials specifically designed for outdoor installation and job site conditions.

8oz PVC Polyester Mesh Construction

Our construction fence banners are made with heavy-duty 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material featuring:

  • Criss-crossed breathable scrim design
  • 37% airflow for wind resistance
  • Superior durability for extended outdoor display
  • Weather-resistant construction for all seasons

Professional Printing Technology

All construction fence banners are printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers that deliver:

  • Vibrant colors that remain bright in outdoor conditions
  • High-resolution graphics and text
  • UV-resistant inks for fade protection
  • Professional finish suitable for business advertising

Made in USA: All construction fence banners are manufactured and printed domestically using premium materials and equipment.

Important: Due to shipping regulations, mesh banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. Contact us for custom freight quotes if folding is not acceptable for your installation.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Mesh Banner Fence Mounting

Choose the right finishing option for your construction fence banner installation:

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets for Secure Installation

Our most popular finishing option provides maximum durability and easy installation on construction fencing. Heat welded hems prevent tearing, while brass grommets offer secure attachment points every 2 feet.

Pole Pockets for Easy Fence Mounting

Ideal for construction fence installations where banners slide directly onto fence rails or mounting poles. Available on top, bottom, left, or right sides depending on your fence configuration.

Reinforced Corners for Extended Durability

Additional material reinforcement at all four corners prevents tearing during high-wind conditions common at construction sites. Recommended for long-term outdoor display.

Reinforced Hems for Wind-Resistant Installation

Double-folded and heat-welded hems on all sides provide superior edge strength for construction site conditions. Essential for banners exposed to consistent wind and weather.

Double-Sided Banner Options for Maximum Visibility

Two separate mesh banners sewn together with a blackout liner between for opacity. Perfect for construction fence corners or areas where visibility from both sides is important.

Custom finishing options are available for specialty construction fence installations. Contact our team to discuss your specific mounting requirements.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Construction Fence Banners

Select the production speed that meets your construction project timeline:

1 Business Day Priority Production

Rush production for urgent construction site needs. Your mesh banner will be printed and finished within 1 business day, plus shipping time. Perfect for last-minute project requirements or emergency site signage.

2 Business Days Express Production

Fast turnaround for time-sensitive construction projects. Ideal when you need professional fence banners quickly without the premium cost of priority production.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production timeline offers the best balance of speed and value. Standard production includes the same quality control and attention to detail as all other options.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Budget-friendly production timeline for construction projects with flexible deadlines. Choose this option when you can plan ahead and want to maximize your signage investment.

Production Time Notes:

  • Production times begin after artwork approval
  • Shipping time is additional and varies by location
  • Large quantity orders may require extended production time
  • Holiday periods may affect standard production schedules

Need a specific delivery date for your construction project? Contact our customer service team to coordinate production and shipping schedules.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Construction Fence Banners

We accept multiple payment methods to make ordering your construction fence banners convenient:

Credit Card Payments

All major credit cards accepted including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover. Secure online payment processing ensures your information remains protected.

Business Account Options

Set up a business account for streamlined ordering on multiple construction projects. Account features include:

  • Net payment terms for qualified businesses
  • Simplified reordering for repeat projects
  • Volume pricing on large quantity orders
  • Dedicated account representative

Purchase Order Processing

We accept purchase orders from established businesses, government agencies, and educational institutions. PO terms and approval process vary by organization type and order value.

Custom Quote Requests

For large construction projects, unique sizes, or special applications, request a custom quote for:

  • Volume pricing on multiple banners
  • Extended payment terms
  • Custom finishing or installation services
  • Coordinated delivery schedules

Questions about payment options or need to set up a business account? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Construction Fence Banner Delivery

Choose the shipping method that works best for your construction project timeline and budget:

Standard Ground Shipping

Cost-effective shipping for most construction fence banner orders. Delivery time varies by location, typically 3-7 business days. Tracking information provided for all shipments.

Expedited Shipping Options

When your construction project has tight deadlines, choose from:

  • 2-Day Express shipping for fast delivery
  • Next Day Air for urgent site requirements
  • Saturday delivery available in select areas

Large Format Shipping Guidelines

Due to carrier regulations, construction fence banners exceeding 8 feet in both dimensions will be folded for standard shipping. This ensures safe transit and reduces shipping costs.

If folding is not acceptable for your installation, custom freight shipping is available. Freight options include:

  • Banners shipped on tubes to prevent creasing
  • Dock-to-dock delivery for large orders
  • Liftgate service if needed
  • Inside delivery to specific job site locations

Job Site Delivery Considerations

For construction site deliveries, please ensure:

  • Someone is available to receive the shipment
  • Delivery address is accessible to shipping trucks
  • Special instructions are provided for complex job sites

Need a freight quote or have special delivery requirements? Contact our shipping team to discuss your construction fence banner delivery needs.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Construction Site Applications for Mesh Fence Banners

Construction fence banners serve multiple purposes on job sites and temporary installations:

Job Site Advertising & Branding

Transform construction fencing into professional advertising space:

  • Display company logos and contact information
  • Advertise construction services to passing traffic
  • Promote upcoming commercial developments
  • Build brand awareness during extended projects

Safety & Information Display

Communicate important site information through fence-mounted banners:

  • Safety reminders and hard hat requirements
  • Project timelines and completion dates
  • Emergency contact information
  • Site access and visitor instructions

Event & Development Promotion

Use construction fence banners for project marketing:

  • Coming Soon announcements for retail developments
  • Pre-leasing information for commercial properties
  • Grand opening promotions
  • Real estate development advertising

Temporary Site Screening

Mesh banners provide visual screening while maintaining airflow:

  • Reduce dust and debris visibility
  • Create professional appearance during construction
  • Maintain 37% airflow to prevent wind loading
  • Weather-resistant for extended outdoor display

Municipal & Government Applications

Government projects benefit from professional fence banner display:

  • Public works project information
  • Road construction timeline communication
  • Community development announcements
  • Tax-funded project transparency
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Construction Fence Banner Printing

Ensure your construction fence banner prints perfectly by following our artwork specifications:

Print-Ready File Specifications

For best results, provide artwork that meets these requirements:

  • Resolution: 100-150 DPI at actual size for optimal print quality
  • File Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG/PNG
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 2" bleed on all sides for finishing
  • Text Size: Minimum 1" tall for readability from typical viewing distance

Design Considerations for Mesh Material

Mesh banner printing has unique characteristics to consider:

  • Avoid fine details or small text that may not reproduce clearly
  • Use bold, high-contrast designs for maximum impact
  • Consider the mesh texture in your design layout
  • Account for 37% open area that affects solid color appearance

Online Design Tools

Create professional construction fence banners using our online designer:

  • Pre-sized templates for common fence banner dimensions
  • Construction industry design elements and graphics
  • Text tools with professional fonts
  • Logo upload and positioning tools

Professional Design Services

Don't have print-ready artwork? Our design team can help:

  • Custom design creation from your concepts
  • Logo recreation and enhancement
  • Layout optimization for mesh banner printing
  • Artwork revision and approval process

Color Match Proof System

For critical color matching, we offer:

  • Digital proofs for color approval before printing
  • Pantone color matching when possible
  • Press proofs for large quantity orders
  • Color consultation with our printing experts

Questions about artwork preparation or need design assistance? Contact our graphics team for professional guidance on your construction fence banner project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Construction Fence Banner Today

Ready to transform your construction fence into professional advertising space? Our custom mesh banners are designed specifically for job site conditions and outdoor installation.

Why Choose Banners.com for Construction Fence Banners?

  • Industry Experience: Serving construction professionals since 2001
  • Quality Materials: 8oz mesh material with 37% airflow for wind resistance
  • Fast Production: Options from 1-5 business days to meet your project timeline
  • Professional Service: Dedicated customer support and in-house design team
  • Made in USA: Domestic manufacturing for reliable quality and delivery

Get Started on Your Construction Banner Order

Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to get professional fence banners for your project:

  1. Select your banner size and quantity
  2. Choose finishing options for your fence type
  3. Upload your artwork or use our online designer
  4. Select production timeline and shipping method
  5. Review and approve your digital proof

Have questions about sizing, installation, or design? Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST at (320) 391-5300. We're here to help make your construction fence banner project successful.

Need a custom quote? For large quantity orders, unique sizes, or special applications, request a custom quote for personalized pricing and service.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Construction Fence Banner FAQ

What material is best for construction fence banners?

8oz PVC polyester mesh is ideal for construction fence applications. The mesh material provides 37% airflow to reduce wind resistance while maintaining durability for outdoor job site conditions.

How do construction fence banners attach to fencing?

Most construction fence banners use grommets every 2 feet for zip-tie attachment to chain link fencing. Pole pockets are available for banners that slide onto fence rails or mounting poles.

What sizes are available for construction fence banners?

We offer sizes from 1'x1' up to 8'x50' to accommodate most construction fence applications. Custom sizes are available through our quote system for unique installations.

How long do construction fence banners last outdoors?

With proper installation, mesh construction banners typically last 6-12 months in outdoor conditions. Lifespan depends on weather exposure, wind conditions, and installation quality.

Can construction fence banners be double-sided?

Yes, double-sided construction banners are available. These feature two separate mesh banners sewn together with a blackout liner for opacity when viewed from either side.

What's the minimum text size for construction fence banners?

For optimal readability from typical viewing distances, text should be at least 1" tall. Consider your specific viewing distance when designing text and logo elements.

Do you offer installation services for construction fence banners?

We provide the banners and finishing hardware. Installation is typically handled by your construction team or local sign installers familiar with your specific fence configuration.

Can I get a rush order for urgent construction projects?

Yes, 1-business day priority production is available for urgent construction site needs. Contact our customer service team to confirm availability for your specific order requirements.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
